title: Faster Minecarts
description: Raise the minecart speed cap on Fabric and build rail systems that actually feel fast, with smart handling to reduce derailments.
body:
# Faster Minecarts Upgrade

Vanilla minecarts are too slow. This makes rail systems worth building again.

Faster Minecarts Upgrade raises the minecart speed cap on Fabric and adds smarter handling to keep high-speed rail travel practical instead of chaotic.

## Features
- Raise the minecart speed cap above vanilla
- Change speed with a simple gamerule
- Smart handling to reduce derailments
- Better support for long-distance rail systems
- Works well for survival transit and server rail networks

## Why use it
- Faster world travel
- Better rail infrastructure
- Makes minecarts feel useful again

## Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
